'''Llanmore''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic Army]] and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Khamar]]'s second-in-command of security for the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]]. He was stationed on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] prior to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] attack on the world in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].

==Biography==
During the war between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Llanmore received a message from General Khamar when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]] led his forces on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Once the army moved directly forward, Llanmore and Khamar prepared together to defend the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]]. Llanmore and his soldiers fought against the Separatist droids until they were perished in the fight.
